title: Shareable Board URL - remove Get started with your own board [Sign up now]

posts.author: mzona (Marisa Zona)
posts.cookedHtml:
When using “SHARE Settings” to create a URL to share a board, it will be very helpful to have the option to exclude the top right reference to "Get started with your own board [Sign up now].

We have multiple meetings we want to use this for however we do not want the meeting attendees to request a paid seat.
